name: DIAPHRAGMATIC HERNIA
definition: CDH = absence of closure of the pleuroperitoneal fold by 9th week of gestational age posterolateral hernia caused by maldevelopment of pleuroperitoneal folds / failure of fusion of anteromedial parasternal defect = space of Larrey / foramen of Morgagni defect in central tendon congenitally large esophageal orifice with herniation of a portion of the stomach into congenital thinning of diaphragmatic muscle that causes an abnormal elevation of part (= focal DIAPHRAGMATIC RUPTURE = DIAPHRAGMATIC INJURY

demographics.Age: antenatal ultrasound @ 24 weeks GA; late presentation in 11%
demographics.Prevalence: 0.8-8% in blunt trauma patients; 5% of all diaphragmatic hernias, but 90% of
demographics.Size: most tears are > 10 cm in length
